evidence: "Great show. Having been brought up on the wrong side of the Iron Curtain..."
"Dull, wooden script and one-dimensional, caricatural characters."
"Subtlety and understatement were replaced by heavy-handedness, obviousness and downright bad narrative lines and dialogue."
"This is a slow and pretentious wanna be art-film..."
"Predictably pretentious. Interesting first 20 minutes, then it goes haughty and self-righteous."
"Great series, solid storyline, well-written dialogue and beautifully filmed."
"If bad acting is not a deterrent for you..."
"I used to love Almodovar. This film's premise is utterly preposterous though..."
"...not exactly at the level of _The Sopranos_, but very good nonetheless."
"There is a great deal of attention paid to period detail, behavior, etc."
"I so wanted to like this film. However, it was unwatchable."
"A film about 'the great 1970s' where women were treated horribly..."

summary: The user shows a preference for drama and period pieces, valuing high production quality and sensory experiences. However, they express disappointment with narrative complexity and pacing in several reviews, indicating a mixed emotional engagement with the content.
